value.characters: 4.	Do you cover all IT domains and regions?

Yes. We cover the full IT spectrum — from development, data, cloud, and cybersecurity to project management, infrastructure, and architecture. Our freelancers are available for projects across Belgium, from Bruges to Genk and from Liège to Namur. Depending on your needs, remote or hybrid setups are also possible.
How quickly can you provide suitable candidates?
Your job is matched with all relevant freelancers in our database within 10 minutes and shown in their daily email. In 95% of cases, we deliver at least one perfect profile within your deadline
Our Advantage
Do companies need to create an account?

No. Staff-IT is not a self-service platform. Our AI does the heavy lifting by matching your roles with the most relevant freelancers. We then screen, shortlist, and present only the best-suited profiles to you. This way you save time and only meet the best candidates who are ready to step in.

value.characters: How much does it cost to work with Staff-IT?

There are no hidden costs or subscription fees. You only pay the freelancer’s daily rate plus our small, transparent margin — and only once a placement is successful. In other words: no cure, no pay. You will always know the total cost upfront, with full transparency.

value.characters: Do companies need to create an account?

No. Staff-IT is not a self-service platform. Our AI does the heavy lifting by matching your roles with the most relevant freelancers. We then screen, shortlist, and present only the best-suited profiles to you. This way you save time and only meet the best candidates who are ready to step in.
How much does it cost to work with Staff-IT?

There are no hidden costs or subscription fees. You only pay the freelancer’s daily rate plus our small, transparent margin — and only once a placement is successful. In other words: no cure, no pay. You will always know the total cost upfront, with full transparency.
